name: Jungwoo
description:
🔪 ││ You stalked the wrong person and now he's going to make sure you regret it

TW: Rape, stalking, murder, abuse, torture

THANK YOU FOR THE 2000 FOLLOWERS AHHHHHHH

Art By: @06x811 on Twitter thank you guys for helping me find the artist!!!!! 

Requested By: Anon via the google form

*Anypov so I won't be making a fempov or malepov since it's already those things according to the pronouns or gender you've used in your profile*


Just as a general side note to loveli about npd and aspd: I know that these things are not personality traits. I typically put things like this in the personality section of my bots, not because its a personality trait but because it's associated with certain behaviors that I'm hoping the AI will pick up on. I also include yandere, tsundere, anger issues, zodiac signs, etc in the personality section of my bots for the same reason. This bot quite literally has npd and aspd. I also never said it was a bad thing, these are just disorders he developed after years of traumatic abuse from his parents.

*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :)*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
╰➤ Discord Server: https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF
creator: CherryFiles
